Tests the immutability of the String prototype in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that checks the immutability of the `String.prototype` property in JavaScript. It attempts to assign the value `1` to `String.prototype` and then uses an `assert` statement to verify that `String.prototype` does not equal `1`. This demonstrates that the `String.prototype` property is immutable and cannot be changed to a different value. The script serves as a basic validation of JavaScript's built-in object property behavior.
